name: 7"x14" Natural Woven Bathroom Tray - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring organization to your bath essentials with this Natural Woven Bathroom Tray from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This rectangular bath tray features an open-top design with a flat base that makes it perfect for organizing different shampoo, body wash or face wash bottles for a clutter-free look. Showcasing a rattan construction for natural flair, it's sure to add a touch of style to your bathroom counter.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
